description_long: This is a muscular adult male figure with a modern, urban appearance. He is shirtless, revealing extensive tattoos across his chest, arms, and abdomen, and wears a striking gold ornamental collar or shoulder piece. His pants are fitted and dark, secured with a belt that features a prominent buckle, and he wears casual sneakers. The figure's arms are relaxed at his sides, and his posture is upright and confident. His hair is styled in a short, voluminous cut with a side part, and his facial features are sharp and well-defined. The overall look suggests a blend of street fashion and fantasy or ceremonial elements.
description: A muscular, tattooed adult male with a gold ornamental collar, dark fitted pants, and sneakers, standing upright with a confident posture.
description_view_0: Front view shows the gold collar, detailed chest and arm tattoos, facial features, and belt buckle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, the profile of the gold collar, and the side of the hairstyle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back design of the gold collar, back tattoos, and the fit of the pants.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right arm tattoos, the side profile of the gold collar, and the hairstyle from the opposite angle.
attribute_clothing_type: ornamental collar, fitted pants, casual sneakers
